subcodes.title: Words to Ahmad Sohrab, spoken on 1914-02-28
subcodes.first_line: Pray from thy heart that my health continue to be well, so that I may attend to all the affairs.
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love and unity, @presence of; reunion with God, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
